metadata.description: Generated Angular client library for the Nest API OpenAPI document.

options.command: node tools/export-nest-openapi.cjs libs/generated/nest-api-client/openapi.json && pnpm exec openapi-generator-cli generate -i libs/generated/nest-api-client/openapi.json -g typescript-angular -o libs/generated/nest-api-client/src/generated --skip-validate-spec --additional-properties=ngVersion=22.0.5,providedIn=root,serviceSuffix=ApiService,apiPackage=api,modelPackage=models,supportsES6=true,withSeparateModelsAndApi=true && node tools/clean-openapi-generated.cjs libs/generated/nest-api-client/src/generated
